message:
fix(update): fix zoxide double-counting in update summary

The zoxide update was still using log_item "ok" after run_cmd,
causing SUCCESS_COUNT to be incremented twice. Fixed to use
direct echo for version info like the other update functions.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.2.2","title":"Inventory wizard/docs CLI flags and map to module/tags","description":"## Goal
Preserve user-facing behavior while replacing internal implementation.

## What to inventory
- Flags currently documented in README and used in website wizard
- Any implicit flows (e.g., vibe vs safe mode)

## Output
- A mapping proposal:
  - legacy flag → tag/module selection
  - default sets for wizard “modes”

## Acceptance criteria
- No behavior drift in wizard flows after refactor.

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.2.3","title":"Inventory runtime assets required for curl|bash bootstrap","description":"## Goal
Ensure `curl | bash` mode bootstraps everything required to complete an install (and to run Phase 0 preflight).

## Why this matters
The new archive bootstrap is only reliable if it’s also *complete*. Missing runtime files turn into confusing failures (“file not found”) that look like bugs.

## Inventory checklist
- `acfs/**` assets deployed to `~/.acfs/` (zsh/tmux/onboard lessons)
- `scripts/lib/**` (installer libraries)
- `scripts/generated/**` (generated module installers + manifest_index)
- `scripts/preflight.sh` (Phase 0 preflight; see `agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-0ok`)
- Any other non-lib scripts that `install.sh` directly executes/sources (avoid surprises)
- Root-level runtime config needed for coherence/security:
  - `checksums.yaml`
  - `acfs.manifest.yaml`
  - (optional but useful) `VERSION`

## Output
- A minimal extraction allowlist (paths/prefixes) with rationale.
- A maintainer note: if you add a new runtime asset or top-level script used by the installer, you must update the allowlist (or choose a broader prefix like `scripts/**`).

## Acceptance criteria
- A future maintainer can confidently answer: “If I add a new script that install.sh executes, will curl|bash installs still work?”

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.3","title":"Phase 2: Manifest schema vNext + migrate acfs.manifest.yaml","description":"## Purpose
Upgrade the manifest from “doc-like list of commands” to a schema that can drive generation and safe execution.

## Key schema additions
- `category`, `phase`
- `run_as` (target_user/root/current)
- `verified_installer` (tool/runner/args)
- `installed_check` (run_as + command)
- `optional`, `enabled_by_default`
- `tags`, `dependencies`
- `generated: false` + `notes:` for orchestration-only or prose

## Acceptance criteria
- Schema validated by parser; invalid manifests fail fast with clear messages.
- All existing modules migrated with explicit intent (no prose-in-install).
- Dependency + phase rules enforced (no future-phase deps).

Make schema changes explicit and validated.

## Work
- Update Zod schema to add fields:
  - category, phase
  - run_as
  - verified_installer
  - installed_check
  - optional, enabled_by_default
  - tags, dependencies
  - generated, notes
- Update TS types to match.

## Acceptance criteria
- Parsing fails fast with actionable errors.
- Schema refinement enforces: generated modules must have install steps or verified_installer.

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.3.2","title":"Add manifest validation: deps exist, no cycles, no future-phase deps","description":"## Goal
Prevent generation of impossible or dangerous execution plans.

## Validation
- Dependency existence check
- Cycle detection (fail fast with cycle path)
- Phase ordering rule: deps must be same or earlier phase

## Acceptance criteria
- Errors are actionable (module IDs + dependency edges listed).

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.3.3","title":"Add function name collision + reserved-name validation","description":"## Goal
Prevent silent overwrites / confusing behavior in generated bash.

## Rules
- No duplicate generated function names across modules.
- No collisions with a reserved list of orchestrator function names.

## Acceptance criteria
- Generator fails fast with a clear rename suggestion.

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.3.4","title":"Migrate acfs.manifest.yaml: phases/categories/run_as/installed_check","description":"## Goal
Migrate `acfs.manifest.yaml` from implicit conventions to explicit intent so generation + selection can be correct and stable.

## Migration checklist (schema vNext)
For **every** module, set:
- `phase` (1–10) OR mark as orchestration-only (`generated: false`)
- `category` (used for grouping/layout; not ordering)
- `run_as` (`target_user` | `root` | `current`)
- `installed_check` (side-effect-free; correct `run_as`)
- `verify` commands (correct `run_as`, stable and idempotent)
- `optional` and `enabled_by_default`
- `tags` (for wizard/legacy flag mapping)
- `dependencies` (for safe `--only` and deterministic ordering)

For orchestration-only behavior:
- set `generated: false`
- move any prose out of `install:` into `notes:` (no prose-in-install)

## Alignment constraints
- Phase numbering must match the existing installer UX framing (Phases 1–10).
- Defaults must stay beginner-safe (don’t surprise users by adding lots of new tools to the default set).
- `optional` should align with the CRITICAL vs RECOMMENDED classification work (`agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-v8a`).

## Acceptance criteria
- No modules left “unassigned” (every module is either generated + complete, or explicitly orchestration-only).
- install/verify semantics are unambiguous and runnable under the declared `run_as`.
- No prose inside `install:` for generated modules.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-21T13:49:21.51209-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-21T14:25:27.200191-05:00","labels":["manifest"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.3.4","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-21T13:49:21.512468-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.3.4","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-21T13:49:22.273791-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

@@ -933,8 +933,9 @@ update_zoxide() {
         return 0
     fi
 
+    # Show version change without double-counting
     if capture_version_after "zoxide"; then
-        log_item "ok" "Zoxide updated" "${VERSION_BEFORE[zoxide]} → ${VERSION_AFTER[zoxide]}"
+        [[ "$QUIET" != "true" ]] && echo -e "       ${DIM}${VERSION_BEFORE[zoxide]} → ${VERSION_AFTER[zoxide]}${NC}"
     fi
 }
